data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where a persona accidentally posts data to the wrong business. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete results or outcomes from this simulation, nor does it confirm that the system can handle such an error effectively. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should either be confirmed as supported or produce a clear failure report, but there is no evidence indicating that this validation was successfully executed or documented.
gaps: No evidence of the outcome from simulating the persona scenario of posting data to the wrong business.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
